name: Maharashtra
description: India's largest pharma manufacturing cluster — Mumbai, Pune, Aurangabad corridors.

name: Delhi
description: National capital region — major drug distribution and regulatory hub.

name: Karnataka
description: Bangalore biotech corridor — key biologics and API formulation cluster.

name: Tamil Nadu
description: Chennai pharma corridor — antibiotic and NSAID manufacturing.

name: West Bengal
description: Eastern distribution hub — critical for northeast India supply chains.

name: Gujarat
description: Ahmedabad–Vadodara pharma belt — India's largest API and formulation export hub.

name: Telangana
description: Hyderabad Genome Valley — biotech R&D and bulk drug manufacturing capital.

name: Andhra Pradesh
description: Visakhapatnam pharma SEZ — major bulk drug and intermediate manufacturing.

name: Uttar Pradesh
description: India's most populous state — highest absolute drug consumption volume.

name: Rajasthan
description: Jaipur pharma cluster — growing formulation manufacturing base.

name: Madhya Pradesh
description: Central India distribution node — Indore pharmaceutical hub emerging.

name: Kerala
description: Highest per-capita drug consumption — critical chronic disease medication demand.

name: Punjab
description: Baddi-Nalagarh pharma corridor (Himachal border) — major formulation manufacturing.

name: Himachal Pradesh
description: Baddi pharma cluster — one of India's top 3 pharmaceutical manufacturing zones.

name: Goa
description: Verna industrial estate — compact high-value pharma manufacturing hub.
